quotes.text: And today is that day for you.
A day to take a first step.
Your day to make your ideas come to life.
It’s your day to be a part of something great.
And your day to join a company that redefines itself every day.
The All-New Kindle Family: from $79 Build your future with Amazon!
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth’s most customer-centric company.
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
quotes.heading: Build your future with Amazon!

quotes.text: Every day across the world we develop the ideas, the services and the products that make life easier for tens of millions of customers, and good things happen faster.
We’ve revolutionized the online shopping experience, cloud computing and the book… join us and see what’s next!
And because the Candidate is our Customer, we want to hear from you—what improvements would you like to see, and what would make it easier for you to find and apply for the right job?
Please be aware that because of the expected volume, we won’t be able to reply to requests sent through this form.
Click here to go to our careers site suggestion form.
What does it take to do this?
We’d like your input on creating a new Global Careers Website!
Play the amazon.jobs game, and guess what words really inspire us every day.
quotes.heading: Amazon.jobs-play the game!

quotes.text: We say that we're "Peculiar," but what does that mean?
quotes.heading: Amazon.jobs-play the game!

quotes.text: Success is measured against the possible, not the probable.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: It's our job to make bold bets, and we get our energy from inventing on behalf of customers.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: For today’s pioneers, that’s exactly why there’s no place on Earth they’d rather build than Amazon.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: Once a decision is determined, they commit wholly.
quotes.heading: Have Backbone; Disagree and Commit

quotes.text: Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study.
quotes.heading: Bias for Action

quotes.text: Leaders focus on the key inputs for their business and deliver them with the right quality and in a timely fashion.
quotes.heading: Deliver Results

quotes.text: Leaders raise the performance bar with every hire and promotion.
quotes.heading: Hire and Develop the Best

quotes.text: They never say “that’s not my job".
quotes.heading: Ownership

quotes.text: Amazon introduced the first Kindle in 2007 - at that time, it offered 90,000 eBooks and sold out 5.5 hours after the announcement.
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: Since then, we have expanded to create the best-selling e-reader family in the world.
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: We have gone beyond Kindle with our powerhouse Fire tablets, built for work...
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: This is what unites Amazonians across teams and geographies as we are all striving to delight our customers and make their lives easier, one innovative product, service, and idea at a time.
quotes.heading: Come build the future with us

quotes.text: Our mission is to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
quotes.heading: Come build the future with us

quotes.text: Amazon evaluates carriers using rigorous security and safety standards, smart trailer technology, chain-of-custody controls, and law enforcement collaboration.
quotes.heading: How Amazon protects cargo from fraud and theft across its shipping network

quotes.text: Safety The safety of our employees and partners is our top priority and integral to everything that we do at Amazon—every day, in every operation, across every country.
quotes.heading: Working at Amazon

quotes.text: Together at Amazon helps us do that by empowering employees to grow, thrive, and connect through customized recommendations for programs, resources, and engagement opportunities.
quotes.heading: Working at Amazon

quotes.text: We offer free public tours to show what happens behind the scenes in our fulfillment centers around the world.
quotes.heading: Working at Amazon

quotes.text: We track the representation of our workforce because we know that diversity helps us build the best possible customer experiences and products for our globally diverse customer base.
quotes.heading: Our workforce data
